calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Advanced From Aug-26-25 To Aug-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-20-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William Scherer for administrator Glenn-Arc Pineda.
Brian Trowbridge for beneficiaries Stephanie Mayo and Michelle Clark, who were also present (via Zoom).

The Court called the matter on the first report of personal representative and petition for final distribution.

The Court inquired whether the allocation agreement submitted with the petition remained acceptable to all beneficiaries. Mr. Scherer confirmed that the beneficiaries continued to agree and believed it was in their best interests. Mr. Trowbridge confirmed agreement on behalf of his clients. Neither counsel offered any additional comments.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant as prayed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Off Calendar
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ADVANCING HEARING FOR FINAL DISTRIBUTION

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Brian Trowbridge, Esq., for Stephanie Mayo & Michelle Mayo (Clarke), Beneficiaries.
No other appearances.

At the court's query, counsel reports that his clients have reached an agreement as to non-pro rata distribution. Counsel confirms receiving an interim accounting as an attachment to Administrator's Amended Petition filed in March. Counsel advises that he believes that a Petition to finalize this matter should be filed by June.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is taken under submission. A new Status Hearing on the filing of either a petition for order for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code Sec.12200 et seq. shall be set sometime in June, or on a date to be determined by the court.

Judge: Hon. Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Continued To Apr-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William Scherer for Glenn-Arc Pineda, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Brian Trowbridge for Stephanie Mayo and Michelle Mayo, Beneficiaries (via Zoom).

The Court noted that the supplemental filing indicated the final accounting could be completed by March 21, 2025. Mr. Scherer confirmed that the final accounting remains on track but noted that some financial statements had been difficult to obtain. He stated that the final accounting will cover the period from the date of death through the end of February 2025, and while there may be minor amendments, the accounting should be in final form. Mr. Trowbridge stated that he had nothing to add but indicated that the beneficiaries are eager to resolve the matter.

The parties requested additional time to continue negotiations and finalize the petition. The court continued the matter to April 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
